## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? One or two sentences. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

<!-- Check the one that applies. Must match the conventional commit type. -->

- [ ] `feat` — new feature (minor version bump)
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix (patch version bump)
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only (no version bump)
- [ ] `chore` — maintenance, deps, refactor, tooling (no version bump)
- [ ] `feat!` / `BREAKING CHANGE` — breaking change (major version bump)

## Process checklist

- [ ] A GitHub issue exists for this change and is linked above
- [ ] `feat` only: a spec exists in `docs/spec/` with status `Accepted`
- [ ] `feat` only: tests are written and reference spec requirement IDs
- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally (or no test script exists yet)

## Cross-repo impact

- [ ] This change does **not** affect `@cowboylogic/cerebro-schema`'s public contract
- [ ] **OR** — this change affects the schema contract and the following are true:
  - A suite-level ADR (`S-XXXX`) in `cerebro/docs/adr/` covers this change
  - Issues have been opened in all affected repos

## Notes

<!-- Anything the reviewer should know: gotchas, follow-on work, open questions. -->
